title: Convert domain errors into use-case errors
scenario: From keeps application orchestration code focused by centralizing conversion from domain errors.

hints.body: Implement From<CreateOrderError> for the existing CreateOrderUseCaseError enum.
The from method should return CreateOrderUseCaseError::Domain(error).
One complete solution for Convert domain errors into use-case errors is shown below.

completionExplanation: Domain errors can now move into the use-case error type through From, which lets orchestration code use standard conversions.
